note: Scratch arm policy with one continuous kinematic motion reward: no explicit standing posture angle, no low-speed still threshold, dominant-foot cross-delta side arm lift. Command: KinematicScratchCrossDelta: checkpoint=null; old shoulder style and arm energy rewards disabled; pitch target from abs(vx_cmd)*left-right foot x distance; side roll target dominant-foot delta coupled so only the opposite arm is raised by the more outward leg.
